caption: SQS with Retry and DLQ
context: Given SQS's visibility timeout mechanism (which makes implementing exponential backoff straightforward), automatic dead-letter queue support, and managed scaling, we'll use SQS for our system.

caption: Robots.txt and Rate Limiting
context: We also need to respect the rate limit of 1 domain a second. With multiple crawlers, this can get a little trickier since, in theory, all N crawlers could be hitting a single domain at the same time.

caption: Scale and Efficiency
context: Last thing! Watch out for crawler traps
